findings.evidence: PR description says this supports roadmap intention #33; `roadmap/TauCetiRoadmap/OneParameterSemigroups/README.md:178` states the Bernstein theorem milestone and `:185` calls for Prokhorov measure extraction, while `rg -n "OneParameterSemigroups|roadmap" code/TauCeti/Analysis/CompletelyMonotone/BernsteinAux.lean code/TauCeti/Analysis/CompletelyMonotone/BernsteinMeasures.lean code/TauCeti/MeasureTheory/Measure/Prokhorov.lean` has no hits.
findings.fix: Add a module-doc reference in the new files, or at least the Bernstein entry-point docs, to `TauCetiRoadmap/OneParameterSemigroups/README.md` Part B / Bernstein theorem milestone.
findings.issue: The new Bernstein/Prokhorov infrastructure follows the OneParameterSemigroups roadmap milestone but none of the new module docs credit that roadmap source.

summary: External mathematical sources are credited, but the human roadmap blueprint named in the PR is not carried into the new code docs.
